---
title: Untitled
format:
  modern2-cv-pdf: default
author: Gabriel Rodrigues
cvfont: raleway #texlive fonts like raleway,fetamont,gillius,comfortaa
cvcolor: 
  main: 577A48
  accent: 3E8D1C
jobtitle: Bioinformatics Scientist
sidebar:
  image: profile.jpg
  bullets:
    - Bahia, Brazil
    - Full Remote
    - LatAm Timezone (GMT-3)
  sections: 
    - name: Stack
      items:
        - text: R
          exp: 
            text: "5 years"
            num: 1
        - text: Rmarkdown
          exp: 
            text: "5 yrs."
            num: 1
        - text: Python
          exp: 
            text: "3 yrs."
            num: 0.6
        - text: Shiny
          exp: 
            text: "2 yrs."
            num: 0.4
        - text: Quarto
          exp: 
            text: "2 yrs."
            num: 0.4

    - name: Core Skills
      items:
        - NGS \& Bulk RNA-Seq Analysis
        - Multi-omics Integration
        - Functional Genomics
        - Cloud \& HPC (AWS, Linux, SLURM)

    - name: Workflows
      items:
        - Python (Pixi, UV) 
        - R (Bioconductor)
        - Bash \& Conda
        - Nextflow Pipelines
        - Machine Learning \& LLMs

    - name: Data Visualization
      items:
        - R Shiny \& HTML
        - Quarto \& RMarkdown
        - Plotly, ggplot \& D3.js

    - name: Education
      items:
        - text: "MSc. in Genetics and Molecular Biology"
          inst: "Universidade Estadual de Santa Cruz"
          time: "04/2023 - 05/2025"
          details: "RNA-Seq Analysis of cocoa tissues"
        - text: "Bachelor in Interdisciplinary Sciences"
          inst: "Universidade Federal do Sul da Bahia"
          time: "06/2018 - 08/2022"
          details: "Biostatistics of Native species in Antlantic Forest"

    - name: Contact
      items:
        - icon: phone
          text: "+55 73 98111 3295"
        - icon: envelope
          text: gvpina.rodrigues@gmail.com
        - icon: home
          text: Personal Blog
          href: https://gabrielvpina.github.io/myBlog/
        - icon: github
          text: gabrielvpina
          href: https://github.com/gabrielvpina
        - icon: twitter
          text: gabrielvpina
          href: https://twitter.com/gabrielvpina  

execute: 
  echo: false
---

```{r}
#| label: cvevents
cvevents <- function(tbl, when, what, where, descr) {

    command_start <- "\\cvevent"
    tbl[[where]] <- gsub("\n", " \\\\newline ", tbl[[where]])
    res <- paste0(
        command_start, "{", tbl[[when]], "}", 
        "{", tbl[[what]], "}",
        "{", tbl[[where]], "}",
        "{", tbl[[descr]], "}"
        )

    cat(res, sep = "\n\n\n")
}

cvproj <- function(tbl,what,role,items){
    command_start <- "\\cvproj"
    res <- paste0(
        command_start, "{", tbl[[what]], "}",
        "{", tbl[[role]], "}",
        "{", sapply(tbl[[items]], function(x)paste0(x,collapse = ", ")), "}"
    )

    cat(res, sep = "\n\n\n")
}
```

# Professional Summary

Bioinformatics Scientist with extensive experience designing and deploying next-generation sequencing (NGS) workflows and integrating complex multi-omics datasets. Proficient in UNIX/Linux high-performance computing, Bash scripting, and orchestrating scalable data pipelines utilizing Nextflow and AWS cloud infrastructure. Demonstrated expertise in developing advanced analytical approaches—including machine learning and dimensionality reduction algorithms—to mine genomic databases for target identification. Strong track record of automating data processing and translating large-scale biological datasets into actionable insights through robust R Shiny applications.

# Experience

```{r}
#| label: experience
#| output: asis
tibble::tribble(
    ~role, ~institution, ~dates, ~details,
    "PhD Researcher, Bioinformatics \\& NGS Workflows", 
    "Biotechnology and Genetics Center\nUESC - Universidade Estadual de Santa Cruz", 
    "04/2025 - Present", 
    "Architected and deployed automated NGS data analysis workflows using Python, Bash, and Nextflow on AWS and Linux HPC environments (SLURM). Developed 'ViralQuest', an open-source pipeline for rapid viral sequence mining and annotation. Innovated analytical methods by implementing Isomap and machine learning algorithms for multi-omics predictive modeling.",

    "Public Health Data Analyst \\& R Shiny Developer", 
    "UESC - Universidade Estadual de Santa Cruz\nRegional Health Authorities", 
    "08/2025 - Present", 
    "Developed interactive data visualization tools and web applications using R Shiny to integrate and analyze large-scale disease datasets from the Notifiable Diseases Information System (SINAN). Automated reporting pipelines to deliver rigorous, actionable insights to cross-functional teams and public health stakeholders.",

    "Genomics Researcher - Transcriptomics", 
    "Biotechnology and Genetics Center\nUESC - Universidade Estadual de Santa Cruz", 
    "04/2023 - 05/2025", 
    "Performed comprehensive bulk RNA-seq data analysis to interpret functional genomic datasets. Utilized R/Bioconductor for statistical analysis, differential expression, and integration of multi-omics data. Benchmarked bioinformatics tools, ensured stringent QC measures, and contributed to peer-reviewed publications regarding novel target identification."

) |>
    cvevents(when = "dates", what = "role", where = "institution", descr = "details")
```

# Key Projects and Computational Tools
  
Check my **[GitHub profile](https://github.com/gabrielvpina/)** for a list of code repositories.  
<br>

```{r}
#| label: proj
#| output: asis
tibble::tribble(
    ~what, ~role, ~items,
    "ViralQuest Bioinformatics Pipeline", "Creator and Lead Developer",
        "Engineered an automated, scalable Python package (published on PyPI) for end-to-end pathogen sequence identification.
        Integrated advanced sequence alignment and data mining methodologies across public genomic databases.
        Maintained rigorous technical documentation, strict version control, and modular coding standards for cross-functional scientific use.
        The project also utilizes D3.js resources to create a final HTML report to the final user."
    ,
    "Scalable Data Visualization Frameworks", "Developer",
        "Built dynamic R Shiny applications designed to process, analyze, and visualize high-throughput epidemiological datasets in real-time.
        Ensured compliance with data integrity standards while translating raw statistical outputs into accessible formats for non-technical audiences.
        The project uses a combination of bslib/custom CSS to styling, shinymanager for authentication and the package renv combined with docker to version control and reproducibility."
    ,
    "Multi-omics Data Integration \\& Functional Genomics", "Genomic Analyst",

        "Led end-to-end processing of transcriptomic data (processing, assembly, downstream statistical analysis) using state-of-the-art computational methods.
        Identified novel biological targets via comprehensive miRNA network screening and pathway characterization.
        Collaborated seamlessly across disciplinary boundaries to interpret complex results and co-author technical manuscripts."
) |>
    cvproj(what = "what", role = "role", items = "items")
```

# Selected Publications

```{r}
#| label: publications
#| output: asis
tibble::tribble(
    ~dates, ~title, ~authors, ~details,
    "02/2026", "ViralQuest: A user-friendly interactive pipeline for viral-sequences analysis", 
    "\\textbf{Rodrigues, G. V. P.} et al.", 
    "BMC Bioinformatics. DOI: https://doi.org/10.1186/s12859-026-06391-6",

    "02/2026", "Tracing ancient viral footprints: endogenous viral elements in \\textit{Bombus} species", 
    "Conceição, L. B. A., ..., \\textbf{Rodrigues, G. V. P.} et al.", 
    "Mobile DNA. DOI: https://doi.org/10.1186/s13100-026-00393-0",

    "06/2025", "Insights into miRNAs of the Stingless Bee \\textit{Melipona quadrifasciata}", 
    "Soares, D. O., ..., \\textbf{Rodrigues, G. V. P.} et al.", 
    "Non-Coding RNA. DOI: https://doi.org/10.3390/ncrna11030048",

    "04/2025", "\\textit{Theobroma cacao} Virome: Public RNA-Seq Data for Viral Discovery", 
    "\\textbf{Rodrigues, G. V. P.} et al.", 
    "Viruses. DOI: https://www.mdpi.com/1999-4915/17/5/624",

    "07/2024", "The Virome of Cocoa Fermentation-Associated Microorganisms", 
    "Santos, J. P. N., \\textbf{Rodrigues, G. V. P.} et al.", 
    "Viruses. DOI: https://doi.org/10.3390/v16081226"

) |>
    cvevents(when = "dates", what = "title", where = "authors", descr = "details")
```
